title: dorstenia dorstenioides
intro: Dorstenia dorstenioides, also known as the East African stinging nettle or stinging dodder, is a plant species in the family Moraceae. This plant is characterized by its stinging hairs that cause irritation and inflammation when touched, which can be used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Dorstenia dorstenioides have been used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
